name: llmlibrarian
description: Search your own indexed folders by meaning. Returns cited chunks from local silos for the host model to answer from.
long_description: llmLibrarian is a local-first index over folders you choose (silos). MCP tools expose semantic retrieval (`query_personal_knowledge`, `multi_query_knowledge`), ingest (`add_silo`, `trigger_reindex`), and health checks. The host assistant synthesizes answers from returned chunks; use the `pal ask` CLI with Ollama for fully local Q&A. Supports PDF, DOCX, XLSX, PPTX, and text/code.

db_path.title: Database path
db_path.description: Absolute path to your my_brain_db directory (e.g. /Users/you/llmLibrarian/my_brain_db)

model.title: Ollama model
model.description: Ollama model for local `pal ask` / llmli (not used by MCP retrieval tools)
